## Type of Change
- [ ] ADR / decision document
- [ ] Schema (BIM / AIM / CAM / operation contract)
- [ ] Runtime engine
- [ ] Technology adapter
- [ ] AI agent / model adapter
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Reference scenario (Customer Onboarding / Expense Approval / Insurance Claim)

## Governance Checklist
- [ ] Change is scoped to one workstream
- [ ] Schema changes carry a version bump and migration note
- [ ] AI-related changes record model, prompt template version, and provenance shape
- [ ] Runtime/adapter changes reference the conformance test they satisfy
- [ ] Trace events preserved / extended, not silently removed
- [ ] No arbitrary executable metadata introduced
